title: Cost a project
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Cost a project demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine resources required for the project

pcs.text: Identify and interpret project objectives, required work activities and available finance in line with enterprise guidelines and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and interpret project objectives, required work activities and available finance in line with enterprise guidelines and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and interpret project objectives, required work activities and available finance in line with enterprise guidelines and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Identify resources required for project works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify resources required for project works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify resources required for project works.

pcs.text: Identify factors affecting resource costs using available information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify factors affecting resource costs using available information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify factors affecting resource costs using available information.

pcs.text: Select and use appropriate tools, equipment and technology for the calculation and documentation of project costs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use appropriate tools, equipment and technology for the calculation and documentation of project costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use appropriate tools, equipment and technology for the calculation and documentation of project costs.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine resources required for the project

elements.title: Calculate individual itemised costs of the project

pcs.text: Calculate unit and total cost for each resource item
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate unit and total cost for each resource item?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate unit and total cost for each resource item.

pcs.text: Evaluate total itemised resource costs against the financial schedule for the project and assess value for money
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate total itemised resource costs against the financial schedule for the project and assess value for money?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate total itemised resource costs against the financial schedule for the project and assess value for money.

pcs.text: Make adjustments where required to reconcile resource costs with project schedules
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make adjustments where required to reconcile resource costs with project schedules?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make adjustments where required to reconcile resource costs with project schedules.

pcs.text: Identify and determine costs for peripheral works arising from the project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and determine costs for peripheral works arising from the project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and determine costs for peripheral works arising from the project.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Calculate individual itemised costs of the project

elements.title: Prepare a summary of the cost of the project

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collate and schedule resource costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate and schedule resource costs.

pcs.text: Calculate and record total project costs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate and record total project costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate and record total project costs.

pcs.text: Document summary of costs and submit financial summary for approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document summary of costs and submit financial summary for approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document summary of costs and submit financial summary for approval.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare a summary of the cost of the project

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
